scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: cd backend && node -e "const mysql=require('mysql2/promise');mysql.createConnection(process.env.DATABASE_URL).then(async c=>{const[r]=await c.execute('SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME=\'Lesson\' AND CONSTRAINT_TYPE=\'FOREIGN KEY\'');await Promise.all(r.map(x=>c.execute('ALTER TABLE Lesson DROP FOREIGN KEY \`'+x.CONSTRAINT_NAME+'\`').catch(()=>{})));c.end()}).catch(()=>{})" && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd .. && node backend/dist/index.js
